creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
This was fixed with the recent update to hplip 3.17.11 in the ports head branch via commit r457127. (the share/ppd/HP/hp-officejet_pro_8600.ppd.gz file is now installed by the print/hplip port).

Given that the 2018Q1 ports tree will branched in a few days, no need to MFH.

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/print/hplip/pkg-plist?r1=450329&r2=457127
